acceptedIds: Arizona driver's license or non-operating ID
exceptions: Voters without photo ID may present two forms of non-photo ID (utility bill, bank statement, government document, paycheck, or vehicle registration with name and address). A signature is required as a fallback.
provisionalBallotRules: Voters who cannot provide ID may cast a provisional ballot. They have 5 business days to present ID to the county recorder.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Arizona allows cell phones in polling places but prohibits photography or video of the ballot.
